evals.prompt: I'm a student at HKU and I want to automatically download all my lecture slides and assignments from Canvas and upload them to NotebookLM so I can study with AI. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Should guide through: install deps, get Canvas API token, discover courses, create config.yaml, authenticate NotebookLM, test run

evals.prompt: My Canvas token keeps failing with 'Canvas login failed'. I'm at Sydney University, canvas.sydney.edu.au. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Should troubleshoot: check token expiration, verify Canvas URL format, suggest regenerating token

evals.prompt: I already have the sync tool set up but I added a new course mid-semester. How do I add it to my config without losing my existing setup?
evals.expected_output: Should explain: edit config.yaml to add new course entry with canvas_id and local_path, run discover to get new ID, then run sync
